enabled.hint: Keep enabled only after bridge_url and whitelist are configured.

bridge_token.description: Optional shared secret sent to the XinYu bridge endpoint.
bridge_token.hint: Leave empty for local testing only.

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout while waiting for XinYu to reply.
timeout_seconds.hint: Use a larger value for long model calls.

proactive_enabled.hint: When enabled, the plugin polls /proactive and sends one claimed message to the owner session.

proactive_url.hint: Leave empty to derive http://host:port/proactive from bridge_url.

proactive_ack_url.description: Local XinYu proactive send acknowledgement endpoint.
proactive_ack_url.hint: Leave empty to derive http://host:port/proactive/ack from bridge_url.

proactive_poll_seconds.hint: The XinYu core still enforces its own cooldown; this only controls AstrBot polling.

proactive_initial_delay_seconds.description: Seconds to wait after plugin load before the first proactive poll.
proactive_initial_delay_seconds.hint: Use a small delay so AstrBot and NapCat can finish startup.

proactive_min_interval_seconds.description: Minimum seconds XinYu core should enforce between successful proactive sends.

proactive_target_session.description: Explicit AstrBot session for proactive private messages.
proactive_target_session.hint: Example: platform-id:FriendMessage:user-id. Leave empty to learn from owner chat or infer from owner_user_ids.

proactive_platform_id.description: Platform id used to infer proactive_target_session.
proactive_platform_id.hint: Use the id from AstrBot platform config when there is more than one platform.

file_learning_enabled.description: Forward QQ file attachments to XinYu's learning ingest endpoint.
file_learning_enabled.hint: When enabled, file-only messages are accepted instead of being ignored.

learning_ingest_url.hint: Leave empty to derive http://host:port/learning/ingest from bridge_url.

file_learning_origin.description: Learning origin assigned to QQ file attachments.
file_learning_origin.hint: Use owner_supplied for files sent by the owner.

file_learning_stage.description: Stage accepted files into XinYu's source-material pipeline.
file_learning_stage.hint: Recommended true so XinYu can review and integrate the material later.

file_learning_max_bytes.description: Maximum file size copied into the learning library.

require_whitelist.hint: Recommended true during all early testing.

whitelist_user_ids.description: Platform user ids allowed to talk to XinYu.
whitelist_user_ids.hint: Use string ids exactly as AstrBot reports them.

owner_user_ids.description: User ids considered owner-side private chat.
owner_user_ids.hint: Forwarded as metadata only; XinYu core still decides memory.

private_only.hint: Recommended true until group policy is validated.

allow_group_messages.description: Allow group text events to be forwarded.
allow_group_messages.hint: Keep false until group memory policy is ready.

stop_astrbot_pipeline.description: Stop other AstrBot handlers after XinYu accepts a message.
stop_astrbot_pipeline.hint: Prevents AstrBot's own LLM from answering after XinYu.

stop_blocked_private_events.description: Stop AstrBot's downstream handling for blocked private messages.
stop_blocked_private_events.hint: Prevents non-whitelisted private chats from reaching default LLM.

deny_message.description: Optional text sent to blocked private users.

show_bridge_errors.description: Send bridge error messages back to the chat.
show_bridge_errors.hint: Useful in testing; disable for normal use.

ignore_prefixes.description: Text prefixes ignored by the bridge.
ignore_prefixes.hint: Useful for AstrBot commands that should not go to XinYu.

passthrough_commands.description: Command names ignored by the bridge even after AstrBot strips the wake prefix.
passthrough_commands.hint: Keep sid here so QQ can still report the sender id before whitelist setup.
